title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while Smart Falcon and I are out
together...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, look at that! ☆ What adorable
plushies! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's looking at a claw machine filled with little
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I bet surrounding myself with these adorable
things will up my Umadol power! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I've got a request for you. ☆ I'd just
love it if you could get me some plushies! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'll be cheering you on with all my
spirit!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I believe in you, Trainer! You got this! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I'm getting roped into this. All the
same...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
